# Define domain dashboards

## Summary

Design dedicated dashboards for each major ocent domain so users can understand status, trends, and action items at a glance.

## Why

ocent is intended to be the central operational hub for private administration. That requires summary views per area, not only record management screens.

## Scope

- define dashboard goals for finance
- define dashboard goals for documents
- define dashboard goals for storage
- define dashboard goals for contracts
- define a consolidated finance dashboard across money accounts, depots, pension insurance records, liabilities, receivables, and real estate
- define a retirement dashboard across pension insurance and projected capital income
- define contract dashboard views for condition history and price development
- define contract dashboard views for cancellation deadlines, reminders, and rule changes
- define a central task and deadline center across all domains
- define finance dashboard views for budgeting, planning, and budget-versus-actual analysis
- define tax workflow views for completeness, review state, and deadlines
- define notification and escalation surfaces across the application
- define storage dashboard alerts for low stock, out-of-stock products, and notable offers
- identify shared dashboard patterns and domain-specific widgets

## Acceptance Criteria

- each major domain has a documented dashboard purpose
- finance dashboard requirements include KPI widgets
- consolidated finance dashboard requirements cover all-time KPI views across the full financial picture
- retirement dashboard requirements include pension and projected capital income widgets
- central task and deadline center requirements are documented
- finance dashboard requirements include budgeting and planning widgets
- tax workflow dashboard requirements are documented
- notification and escalation surface requirements are documented
- documents, storage, and contracts dashboards include operational overview widgets
- contract dashboard requirements include historical condition and price development views
- contract dashboard requirements include cancellation deadline and reminder views
- storage dashboard requirements include alert widgets and inventory summaries
- the output is specific enough to drive UI and backend follow-up issues
